add.lore: The shifting mosaic that graces the winter skies has always struck you as a faint trace of some grand precursor, pure and whole. As you look up at what remains, fragmented beyond the horizon, you can't help but wonder what it would take to break it once more.

majorIds.Juggle: Mutilate adds an additional 12 hits. All hits are reduced by -10%.

before.lore: Roll the dice, hit a match. You never miss.

majorIds.Juggle: Mutilate adds an additional 12 hits. All hits are reduced by -10%.

after.lore: Roll the dice, hit a match. You never miss.

majorIds.Manic Edge: While vanished, lose 5% of your max mana per second. Increase Surprise Strike's damage bonus by 5% per mana lost from this effect, up to 130%.

before.lore: A strength fueled by rage, merciless, unending. A hatred, all-consuming, that erodes all other thought, all sense of being. An ally so fickle, so selfish, that leaves you aimless at the moment of pyrrhic triumph.

majorIds.Manic Edge: While vanished, lose 5% of your max mana per second. Surprise Strike further increases your damage by 3% per mana lost from this effect, up to 70%.

after.lore: A strength fueled by rage, merciless, unending. A hatred, all-consuming, that erodes all other thought, all sense of being. An ally so fickle, so selfish, that leaves you aimless at the moment of pyrrhic triumph.
